race.description: Sportsbet Fast Form Festival State Sprint Series Final (Bm76) Hcp
race.comment: DOBBINAIR (10) found himself in a world of hurt here last week after being slowly away from a low draw and went to the line untouched climbing all over their backs. This gelding is flying without winning and while he draws sticky again low, with a touch of luck he can put them away. NICISH (11), as is often the case, gave away too much start last time but charged home strongly. If they run along up front, she'll be launching late. METRICAL (6) returned with a solid effort and has a strong second-up record. With Holder sticking, he shapes as a genuine threat. HIGH ON SUGAR (3) is in form and gets a key booking with B Melham. Holding that level will see him right in the finish again. DECLARED (5) has been consistent of late and brings ratings that measure up well. Can't be overlooked.
